changes.old_value: Monday to Saturday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM
changes.new_value: Monday to Sunday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM, 10:00 AM to 3:00 PM on Sundays
changes.reason: Added Sunday hours to accommodate increased Sunday calls
Updated phone number for backup on-call contact
Adjusted callback time to a more realistic guarantee

changes.old_value: don't book jobs for commercial properties without checking with Donna first
changes.new_value: don't book any jobs automatically, all bookings require manual review
changes.reason: Tightened rules to prevent auto-booking and reduce no-shows

changes.old_value: be warm and friendly, don't put people on hold for more than 30 seconds
changes.new_value: be warm and friendly, don't put people on hold for more than 30 seconds, always ask the caller if they're a new or existing customer
changes.reason: Added question to prioritize customer calls

summary: Updated business hours to include Sundays, changed backup on-call contact to Marcus Webb, adjusted emergency fallback callback time to 30 minutes, tightened integration constraints to require manual review of all bookings, and added a question to prioritize customer calls.
